case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. TRACEY P. FAULKNER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2004 CONTINUED TO DEC-08-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). OCT-20-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
